name: NYC Zoning Tax Lot Database (ZTLDB) — NYC Open Data tabular (SODA)

authentication.recommended: Socrata application token via X-App-Token header (platform behavior verified in M1-T001, E7)
authentication.evidence: SODA endpoint queried anonymously live 2026-07-16 (Z3, Z4)

rate_limits.without_token: throttled by IP in shared pool
rate_limits.evidence: Socrata platform docs verified in M1-T001 (E7, dev.socrata.com/docs/app-tokens)

update_frequency: Stated Monthly (dataset description verbatim, Z2: 'The Database is updated on a monthly basis to reflect rezoning and corrections to the file.'; custom fields Update Frequency Monthly, Automation Yes). OBSERVED VIOLATION on 2026-07-16: rowsUpdatedAt raw 1775414816 = 2026-04-05T18:46:56Z (~3.4 months stale); independently corroborated by data.gov (last checked 2026-07-07, still 'April 5, 2026'; Z13). The current s-media data dictionary cites source data DTM 2026-06-09 + NYC GIS Zoning Features 2026-05-20, i.e. the DCP bulk release is NEWER than the Socrata rows (Z5). See OQ-3. RE-CONFIRMED at M2-T008 connector build (live capture 2026-07-20, fixture ZT08): rowsUpdatedAt STILL 1775414816 = 2026-04-05T18:46:56Z (~3.5 months; row count still 857,951, fixture ZT09) - the stall persists across another monthly boundary; the connector freshness guard (threshold 45 days) fires on every live fetch.
geographic_coverage: All five boroughs; all tax lots from the specified DOF Digital Tax Map version (dictionary OVERVIEW verbatim, Z5). 857,951 rows on 2026-07-16 ($select=count(bbl), Z4). One row per tax lot; condominium BBL is the billing lot (Socrata bbl column description, Z2). Marble Hill borough code 1 (legally Manhattan), Rikers borough code 2 (legally Bronx) (dictionary NOTE, Z5).

fields_available.note: Authoritative SODA column inventory: 16 columns from the api/views columns array (Z2), matching the official data dictionary read directly from s-media (all 11 pages, Z5). SODA omits blank fields per record (verified live: sample record lacked commercial_overlay_*, limited_height_district, zoning_district_3/4, special_district_2/3 keys; Z3). Number-typed columns (borough_code, tax_block, tax_lot, bbl) serialize as JSON strings.
columns: bbl (number; borough + block zero-padded to 5 + lot zero-padded to 4 = 10 digits; condo = billing lot)

zoning_district_1 (text 9; greatest % of lot area; since 2019-12-31 assigned even if <10% for mostly-underwater lots; G1 C4: Socrata column description states it may contain 'the Zoning Resolution section number that pertains to special requirements for selected properties in Queens' — NOT a closed Appendix B enum; parser must tolerate ZR section-number values)
zoning_district_2 (text 9; second greatest %; blank if lot not divided by a zoning boundary line)
zoning_district_3 (text 9; third greatest %; blank if not split three ways)
zoning_district_4 (text 9; fourth greatest %; blank if not split four ways)
commercial_overlay_1 (text 4; greatest %; valid values C1-1..C1-5, C2-1..C2-5 per Appendix C)
special_district_1 (text 6; greatest %; overlapping same-percentage districts joined with '/'; Appendix A abbreviations)
limited_height_district (text 5; Appendix D: LH-1, LH-1A; LH-2/LH-3 currently unused)
zoning_map_number (text 3; from DCP Quartersection Map Index)
zoning_map_code (text 1; 'Y' = lot may be on the border of two or more zoning maps; zoning_map_number is then one of the potential maps)
fields_available.assignment_rules_verbatim_basis: Dictionary OVERVIEW (Z5): zoning districts / special districts / limited height districts assigned when the feature covers >= 10% of the lot; commercial overlays assigned when the overlay covers >= 10% of the lot AND/OR >= 50% of the overlay feature is within the lot. Split lots: districts ordered by descending percentage of lot area across zoning_district_1..4.
fields_available.park_caveat: Lots intersecting features designated PARK / BALL FIELD / PLAYGROUND / PUBLIC SPACES get the single value PARK; 'Lots designated as PARK should not be used to calculate the amount of open space in an area' (Z5 verbatim).
fields_available.null_semantics: Blank = not applicable / lot not split further (explicit for zoning_district_2..4); blanks appear as omitted keys on SODA records; no sentinel values documented.

terms_usage_notes: DCP disclaimer (dictionary verbatim, Z5): provided for informational purposes only; no warranty of completeness, accuracy, content, or fitness. NYC Open Data terms as verified in M1-T001 (OQ-8 there, resolved).
connector_implementation: IMPLEMENTED (task M2-T008): services/api/app/connectors/ztldb_soda.py - fixture-driven per-BBL connector. fetch_by_bbl validates the BBL (app.connectors.bbl) BEFORE query construction, fetches /api/views metadata first (authoritative 16-column snapshot check + rowsUpdatedAt freshness guard, threshold 45 days, injected clock; dataset_version label 'socrata-rows-<rowsUpdatedAt RFC3339>' because the dataset has no version column), then the bounded record query (?bbl=<canonical>&$order=bbl&$limit=10). Emits canonical source_fact records with full provenance and separate raw/response/normalized digests (ZT_CANONICALIZATION_SPEC); preserves split-lot ordering, slash-tie special-district components, the PARK caveat flag, open zoning_district_1 vocabulary (advisory observations only), and the four presence states (present / observed-null / not-applicable-per-source-semantics / absent-undocumented). Typed error taxonomy: upstream_error, malformed_response, schema_drift, timeout, rate_limited, disallowed_request, paging_pathology, budget_exhausted, circuit_open (+ shared validation_error via BBLValidationError; no_record is a RESULT status). ResilientZtldbFetcher composes the M1-T009 cache/breaker/LKG/budget primitives and stamps transport staleness ONLY (owner two-staleness rule: source age never sets served_from_cache/stale). scan_rows provides a BOUNDED deterministic multi-page scan with duplicate/no-progress/ordering/overflow/budget pathology detection - full 857k-row sync remains out of scope. Cross-check: app/profile/zoning_crosscheck.py compares ZTLDB vs PLUTO zonedist1-4/overlay1-2/spdist1-3/ltdheight/zonemap/zmcode (plus fixture-derived zoning-features observations) and emits contract-1.3.0 conflict entries (both observations preserved, resolution unresolved, no adjudication). Fixture pack: services/api/tests/fixtures/ztldb/** (11 raw live captures 2026-07-20 + 13 labeled synthetics + MANIFEST.json). Monthly full paged sync on a Render worker and live nyzd/nyco spatial intersection remain FUTURE tasks.
latest_source_version: No version column in the data and no version string in Socrata metadata. Socrata rows last updated 2026-04-05T18:46:56Z (raw 1775414816, Z2). Current DCP bulk release pinned by the dictionary SOURCE DATASETS block: DOF Digital Tax Map June 9, 2026 + NYC GIS Zoning Features May 20, 2026 (Z5) — newer than the Socrata rows.
health_status: degraded_suspected — monthly-cadence dataset observed ~3.4 months stale on 2026-07-16 and STILL at rowsUpdatedAt 2026-04-05 on 2026-07-20 (M2-T008 capture; OQ-3 persists); data itself served correctly; connector freshness guard reports source_stale_suspected=true
known_limitations: No per-record version field (unlike PLUTO); freshness only via rowsUpdatedAt
Observed staleness: rows at 2026-04-05 despite Monthly/Automation=Yes; DCP bulk channel ahead (dictionary sources June 2026) — OQ-3
SODA omits blank fields per record; schema must come from the columns array/dictionary, never record keys (Z3)
Number-typed BBL/block/lot serialize as strings; normalize to 10-digit BBL strings (same class of issue as M1-T001 C6)
special_district_1/2 can contain two '/'-joined abbreviations in one 6-char value — parser required (OQ-8)
PARK value is a consolidation, not a definitive parks list; not usable for open-space calculations (Z5 verbatim)
Zoning District 1 logic changed 2019-12-31 (assigned even if <10% for underwater-dominated lots) — historical comparisons must account for it
Dictionary PDF contains a BBL example typo (5158287501 for a Brooklyn lot; Socrata column description has the corrected 3158287501) — use the algorithmic definition, not the example (S4 finding)

zoning_district_1 is NOT a closed enum: may contain a Zoning Resolution section number for selected Queens lots (Socrata column description; G1 C4) — validators must not enforce Appendix B as exhaustive for ZD1
Underlying zoning-feature boundaries carry +/- 20 ft estimated horizontal accuracy (nyzd metadata, Z11) — split assignments near boundaries are not authoritative

OBSERVED at M2-T008 build (2026-07-20): rows with NO zoning_district_1 key exist live (e.g. BBL 1000010201, fixture ZT07b) even after the 2019-12-31 always-assign change — absence carries no documented semantics and the connector surfaces it as a typed observation (zoning_district_1_absent), never a guess

OBSERVED at M2-T008 build (2026-07-20): bounded group-by probe of zoning_district_1 returned 203 distinct values, all matching the Appendix-B shape (R/C/M prefixes incl. slash-joined M/R pairs, PARK, BPC) — no ZR-section-number value currently present in the Socrata rows (the open-set behavior of G1 C4 is exercised by a labeled synthetic fixture, ZT91)

Case formatting differs between presentations: ZTLDB zoning_map_number '16A' vs PLUTO zonemap '16a' for the same lot (observed live) — the cross-check treats pure case differences as typed uncertainty, not conflict
fallback_source: DCP bulk CSV via BYTES of the BIG APPLE (currently NEWER than the SODA channel per dictionary source dates; page https://www.nyc.gov/content/planning/pages/resources/datasets/zoning-taxlot-database is search-evidenced only, nyc.gov 403 to non-browser clients — OQ-1; Render worker import only). G1 C1: the fdkv-4t4z description officially links the previous-versions archive as https://www.nyc.gov/content/planning/pages/resources/datasets/zoning-map-index (403 to non-browser clients, verified 2026-07-16; odd link target recorded as-is). Cross-check presentations: PLUTO SODA 64uk-42ks zoning attributes; live nyzd/nyco spatial intersection (see zoning-features registry records).
open_questions: OQ-1: exact BYTES CSV download URL/file name for ZTLDB (nyc.gov 403; browser capture needed; officially-linked archive pointer .../datasets/zoning-map-index recorded at G1, C1)
OQ-3: cause and duration of the Socrata update stall (PERSISTS as of 2026-07-20, M2-T008 capture — a second monthly boundary has passed; escalation to DCPOpendata@planning.nyc.gov now warranted)

OQ-8: real-world serialization of '/'-combined special-district values — probed live 2026-07-20: NO row currently carries a slash value in special_district_1 or special_district_2 ($where like probes returned []); the documented tie representation is exercised by a labeled synthetic fixture (ZT90, 'GI/WP') until a real occurrence appears
